title: COSEWIC List of wildlife species assessed - Canada.ca
content:
## COSEWIC List of wildlife species assessed
Please note that species included in the Public Registry, reflect those published in the Act on the date of proclamation. This includes those species from Schedules 1, 2, and 3. Any newly assessed wildlife species will not be included until they have been added to the List by order in council.
Search COSEWIC lists of wildlife species assessed

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
